title: MCP Architecture, Negotiation, and Trust Boundaries · Skill Brief: Protocol Messages
summary: Trace one tool call across host, client, server, and external system. Planned artifact: Add and verify the agent ext protocol messages increment in an MCP architecture and threat-boundary diagram. Learners progress through prediction, explicit theory, changed-case practice, causal debugging, and evidence defense.
objectives: Trace initialization, capability negotiation, requests, responses, notifications, and errors.
Distinguish host, per-server client, server, model, user, and external service responsibilities.
Preserve previously learned constraints and attach observable changed-case evidence.
